description: Per-app baselines for scripts/golden-suite-run.js. A run scoring below any of these thresholds is a regression that should block deploy. Numbers derived from V17 Phase D.2 proof runs (2026-04-23/24).

biztoso.notes: V17 direct-require harness: 25-28 unique screens, 6 AuthDriver hits, login crossed. Real-API path (job 23e93fbc): 16 screens, $0.0199, AuthDriver hits=6. Baseline floor is 80% of 17-screen V16 baseline = 14.

wikipedia.notes: V16 historical baseline: 26 unique screens on no-auth content. V17 must hit ≥80% (20). ExplorationDriver pin — no AuthDriver activity expected.

aggregate.notes: Gates from the V17 plan. crossedBoundaryRatio: fraction of included apps that either saw a non-LLMFallback driver act OR reached >4 unique screens.
